mapper.select: /* 대시보드과정공지목록조회 (교수학생공통) : TOPIC - CRS_NOTICE, BADGE - 과정공지 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'CRS_NOTICE' TOPIC, 'CRS_NTC' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'CRS_NTC' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 교수대시보드모든공지목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_DASH_ALL_NOTICE, BADGE - 과정공지 혹은 과목공지 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_DASH_ALL_NOTICE' TOPIC, CASE WHEN BBS_TYCD = 'CRS_NTC' THEN 'ALL' ELSE 'SUBJECT' END BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ADM.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD IN ('NTC', 'CRS_NTC') AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ADM.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 교수대시보드과목공지목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_DASH_SUBJECT_NOTICE, BADGE - 과목 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_DASH_SUBJECT_NOTICE' TOPIC, 'SUBJECT' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ADM.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ADM.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 교수대시보드강의QNA목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_DASH_LCTR_QNA, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MAX(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_DASH_LCTR_QNA' AS TOPIC, 'USER_IMAGE' AS BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID WHERE BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 교수대시보드일대일목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_DASH_1ON1, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MIN(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_DASH_1ON1' AS TOPIC, 'USER_IMAGE' AS BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID WHERE BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 학생대시보드모든공지목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_DASH_ALL_NOTICE, BADGE - 전체 혹은 과목 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_DASH_ALL_NOTICE' TOPIC, CASE WHEN BBS_TYCD = 'CRS_NTC' THEN 'ALL' ELSE 'SUBJECT' END BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD IN ('NTC', 'CRS_NTC') AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ATNDLC.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 학생대시보드과목공지목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_DASH_SUBJECT_NOTICE, BADGE - 과목 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_DASH_SUBJECT_NOTICE' TOPIC, 'SUBJECT' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ATNDLC.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 학생대시보드강의Qna목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_DASH_LCTR_QNA, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MAX(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_DASH_LCTR_QNA' TOPIC, 'USER_IMAGE' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ATNDLC.USER_ID = #{userId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 학생대시보드자료실목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_DASH_DATARM, BADGE - 없음 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_DASH_DATARM' TOPIC, 'NONE' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_BBS BBS JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BA.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'DATA' ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 과목최신공지사항목록조회 : TOPIC - SUBJECT_TOP_NOTICE, BADGE - 점 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'SUBJECT_TOP_NOTICE' TOPIC, 'DOT' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT S JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND S.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 과목최신강의Qna목록조회 : TOPIC - SUBJECT_TOP_LCTR_QNA, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MAX(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'SUBJECT_TOP_LCTR_QNA' TOPIC, 'USER_IMAGE' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID, U.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT S JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND S.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 교수과목최신일대일목록조회 : TOPIC - PROF_SUBJECT_TOP_1ON1, BADGE - 문의자이미지 썸네일 */ WITH REPLY_ATCL AS ( SELECT UP_ATCL_ID, COUNT(*) AS ANSWER_CNT, MAX(ATCL_ID) AS ANSWER_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL WHERE DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY UP_ATCL_ID ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'PROF_SUBJECT_TOP_1ON1' TOPIC, 'USER_IMAGE' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM, NVL(U.PHOTO_FILE_ID, 'user_img') AS USER_THUMBNAIL, RA.ANSWER_ATCL_ID, U.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON ADM.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BA.USER_ID LEFT JOIN REPLY_ATCL RA ON RA.UP_ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND ADM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND S.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}

/* 학생과목최근자료실목록조회 : TOPIC - STDNT_SUBJECT_TOP_DATARM, BADGE - 점 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'STDNT_SUBJECT_TOP_DATARM' TOPIC, 'DOT' BADGE, BBS.BBS_ID, BBS.BBS_TYCD, BA.ATCL_ID, BA.ATCL_TTL, BA.REG_DTTM, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL_INQ_RCD R WHERE R.ATCL_ID = BA.ATCL_ID AND R.VWER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY BA.REG_DTTM DESC ) RN, ORG.ORGNM, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM, S.SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT S JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC ON SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = S.SMSTR_CHRT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BBS.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'DATARM' AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.ORG_ID = #{orgId} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA ON BBS.BBS_ID = BA.BBS_ID AND BA.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_ORG ORG ON ORG.ORG_ID = BBS.ORG_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND S.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} ) WHERE RN <= #{limitTop}
